project_requirements: Publish the completed Codex and Claude automatic Project Governor entrypoint compatibility work as a Project Governor patch release.
Keep Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata, release notes, feature matrix, tests, memory, and install instructions in sync.
Preserve dependency-free deterministic helper scripts and avoid package or lockfile changes.
Release publishing must use gh/GitHub API transport, not plain git push.

dependencies.name: Project Governor plugin
dependencies.usage: Codex and Claude Code governance plugin metadata, runtime planning, task routing, deterministic helper scripts, tests, docs, release metadata, and copied governance templates.
requirement_matches: Natural Codex and Claude project requests enter Project Governor without explicit skill or slash-command invocation.
Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook injects Project Governor workflow context for English and Chinese project-work prompts.
Initialized projects receive CLAUDE.md wording that treats /pg-* commands as optional diagnostics.
plugin-upgrade-migrator surfaces CLAUDE.md template drift for already initialized projects.
Codex CLI, Claude CLI, DeepSeek Flash/Pro, and ai-tryon downstream fixture compatibility evidence is recorded.
dependencies.notes: Patch release for compatibility and instruction-following improvements. It adds no dependencies, package manifests, lockfiles, runtime services, or deterministic helper schema removals.
constraints: No package manifest or lockfile changes.
Template wording changes must be surfaced through migration planning and tests.
Codex and Claude plugin version metadata must remain aligned.
